_comment: Template for CAP harness config. Generated config lives at ~/.claude-platform/harness-config.json. Run 'cap init' to configure.

aws._comment: Used when provider=aws-bedrock. Profile and region set by 'cap init'.

anthropic._comment: Used when provider=anthropic-api. API key is NEVER stored here — only the env var name.

models._comment: Model IDs are region-specific. Set by 'cap init' model probe.

agent_caps._comment: Per-agent-type daily caps in USD. Example: {"opus": 3.0, "security": 2.0}. Empty means no per-agent caps.

indexing._comment: Multi-path indexing configuration. local_paths lists workspace directories to scan. remotes defines git endpoints for auto-cloning.

remotes._example: Remove this entry and add your own remotes

embeddings._comment: Embedding model configuration. Primary uses Bedrock Titan; fallback uses local sentence-transformers (no API calls).
